ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - “Çürük elma” dedi ya; bu çete, çete.
Bakın, insanlıktan nasibini almamış olan bu kitleyle Sayın Sağlık Bakanı, İl Sağlık Müdürüyken muhataptı. Hiç mi görmediniz ya? Bu gemi su alıyor, bu bariz, çok bariz. Kamuda 4 bin tane yatak var, yenidoğan yoğun bakım yatağı, özel sektörde 8 bin küsur, aynısı yetişkin yoğun bakımda değil ve bunları denetlemiyorsunuz. Israrla söylüyorum, gece yüzde 90’ında korsan hekimler çalışan yoğun bakım üniteleri var. SGK anlaşmasını bugün feshetsin o özel hastaneler bu işlemi yapamazlar; bu kadar basit.
Gerçi siz sıranız gelince konuşacaksınız da ben şunu söyleyeyim: Siz bana deyin ki beraber -AK PARTİ’den arkadaşlar da var, hiç önemli değil, milletvekili arkadaşlar ve Sağlık Bakanım da burada- gelin bu akşam gidelim, yarın akşam çat kapı gidelim, İstanbul'da 5 hastaneyi denetleyelim.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Vekilim, son bir dakika, selamlayalım.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Eğer mevzuata uygun ise ben milletvekilliğinden istifa edeceğim, tamam mı? Siz istifa edecek misiniz Sayın Bakan?
Teşekkür ediyorum.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Söylemek istediğim şu: Sayın Bakan operasyonun adını “çürük elma operasyonu” olarak tanımlıyor.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Yanlış koymuş, yumuşak olmuş, soft olmuş biraz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Kasap, teşekkür ederim.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, affedersiniz.
Çetenin adını da "İnsanlıktan nasibini almamış." olarak...
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Adı önemli değil. Ben diyorum ki gelin sizinle beraber çat kapı bir akşam hastaneye gidelim, beraber denetleyelim.
records.englishTranslation:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear present, I greet you all with respect.
Now, I want to speak as a pediatrician, Mr. Minister. You were the health director while they continued their activities in hospitals where gangs were rampant. Being a health director in Istanbul, you need to know how to turn a hospital and how that unit can turn around with only 2 neonatal intensive care specialists. He works 68 hours a week. It is against the Labor Law and all other laws. You also know that these people were not there at night. You and your Deputy Ministers know very well who is on duty in hospitals in Istanbul, hospitals in Izmir, and private hospitals in Ankara, especially during night shifts and in intensive care units. Someone who is not on duty at that hospital, who doesn't work at that hospital, or even who doesn't exist at all. It is also in the latest court records, meaning nurses are on duty and introduce themselves as doctors. Plus foreign nationals are working, plus assistants are working, assistants who cannot get enough wages and whose salaries are not enough are on duty in those hospitals even though they do not have authority.
Let me take this from you now: Come and visit the hospitals in Istanbul, 10-15 hospitals, especially the Avrasya Hospital, if you can afford it, and visit them during a night shift and stop this tragedy. You know, the incident that you make light of by calling it a "bad apple", the newborn gang, you couldn't interfere with these gangs because they were heavy hitters. Since these were heavyweights, you ignored them during your time as the Health Directorate, you were aware of all of them. You know the saying, everyone knew that the ship was taking on water, the captain was lying, and the dice were rigged. All of this was known, I think all the Ministry officials here know, it is impossible for you not to know, if you did not know, it was not right for you to come here anyway. It was not right for you to come here as Minister; I say this with all my sincerity. May God not put anyone in your situation. "From where?" you will say. You were, and are, forced to defend lies, falsehoods and untruths.
Like you, I have worked in all stages of the healthcare system. My first place of duty was also a nice place, I worked as a health center physician in Burdur Yeşilova Salda. I also have an academic career. The last time I came here before resigning, I was the deputy chief physician at a training and research hospital. There is no part of the system that is not broken, and there is nothing left to fix, Mr. Minister.
Now, as my esteemed deputy also mentioned about family medicine, get family doctors out of these makeshift buildings and let them become public property. Doctor friends do not have the opportunity to care for patients because they have to deal with the painting of the building, the whitewashing of the building, their staff, their salaries, heating expenses, etc., rest assured that they do not have the opportunity to care for patients and they have thousands of thoughts in their minds.
And what did you say? "98 percent is postpartum follow-up." Well, Mr. Minister, which country do you live in? In our country, births take place in hospitals, and since they are given in hospitals, postpartum women never go to a health center or see a family doctor within forty days.

How do you get 98 percent of this to be carried, and when you don't, you deduct it from your physician friend's salary. There are hundreds of reports. As it was said before, doctors are given five stars, what would happen if we gave stars to former ministers or members of the AK Party Government? You know, that five-star rating thing? There is no such world! It doesn't exist anywhere in the world. Do not do this, Mr. Minister, and take it back, that is my personal advice to you.
Family medicine staff often come to you, although there is information on Twitter etc. Well, there are 2 nurses working in the same family health clinic, FHC; There are 2 paramedics working; The salary of one is 35-40 thousand liras, the other is minimum wage, and there are even part-time workers.
Mr. Minister, put an end to this oppression - equal pay for equal work - this injustice. Let's skip this paint job.
Let's talk about vaccines. When physicians receive training, they say, "Rota virus - diarrhea vaccine - meningitis vaccine, hepatitis A vaccine - you do that anyway - and this human papilloma virus, that is, cervical cancer vaccine, has been promised, given, given for years, but it has not been done yet, it needs to be done." Physicians receive training on this. You tell the patient, the Ministry does not cover it, SSI does not cover it. The vaccine should be free of charge at the health center, and you need to provide it; That's the missing part.
You actually wanted to make family medicine practice a routine - if not you, I think it will be 2007 - pilot practice was started in 4 provinces - Burdur, Isparta, Denizli - referral chain obligation was introduced, but you gave up on the first day, you gave up for political reasons because you were not supposed to act like that politically, there were crowds in front of the hospitals, a disaster happened and you gave up on the first day. Isn't that right, Mr. Deputy Minister? It should be like this. Then, for years, you couldn't manage the first step referral, just like you couldn't manage the second and third steps. You are causing a complete disaster to people.
Look, Mr. Minister, let me give you my suggestion, please take it into consideration. If primary health care services were completely free, if the drug co-payment was zero or if you reduced it to 10 percent, if you increased the co-payment for patients who go directly to the second step or directly to the third step, at least 30 percent of the patients would not be exposed to a five-minute examination in those hospitals, and 30 percent of those who go to the second step would decrease. That is my personal advice, I say this as someone who has been in this system for years.
Now, regarding PHCs, as I said, the punishment system must also be subject to Law No. 657. What does it mean to issue a separate disciplinary regulation? Moreover, why are the salaries of these physician friends, such as a judge, a prosecutor or a teacher, who use their annual leave for a month, cut? There is no such world, it's been twelve days, it's burned down and you know it, when the physician friends working in ASMs go on leave, they hand it over to another friend and pretend to be working, and they had to resort to this way in order not to have their salaries deducted. You also know, don't you, Mr. Minister? You know, you wandered around.
As a pediatrician, I have to say this about children.

I am ashamed, we are in a country where children with SMA are made to beg with the permission of the governor - I say this sentence all the time. It has been your Ministry's blessing to allow children with SMA, DMD, diabetes, but especially SMA, to beg with the permission of the governor. SMA - I don't need to name it like Zolgensma - is being treated all over the world, let me do the same. We pushed for his approval so much, Mr. Fahrettin - he is also a pediatrician - did not give it, it was not given; We've come this far.
Dear Minister, the following table is the actions of the AK PARTY governments; This painting tells a lot, what a shame! The branch of child health and diseases was the least desired field at TUS and the one that could be entered with the lowest score in the Medical Specialization Exam. After five years, you will not be able to find a doctor to care for children in Türkiye. For child specialization, only 67 percent of the positions you opened for child specialization staff were preferred, and 33 percent of your positions are vacant. What's in the 2nd row, at the bottom? Family medicine is in third place, followed by emergency medicine and pediatric surgery. You won't be able to find a pediatric surgeon in five years. You probably do it with Pakistani, Afghan doctors or Syrian, imported doctors. Where is the most desired place in primary care? Sports medicine, skin, nuclear medicine, medical biochemistry and forensic medicine, etc. So, after five years, you will not be able to find doctors, you will probably import them.
Mr. Minister, I don't know which one we should correct or which one we should talk about, but you know this sensor thing, there are already 30 thousand children, 15 thousand of them barely use it and this does not make 1 tenth of the Presidential plane, do you know that 1 tenth of a plane does not do it. Is there any need to say this much? There is no need.
Now, when it comes to city hospitals and secondary care, Mr. Minister, that's where it's at. Former Ministers always said: "We have no patient guarantee." "We have no patient guarantee. "We have no patient guarantee. You probably say that too, but the thing is lying, isn't it? this
The part of the hospitals built in public-private cooperation, 80 percent of which is paid with foreign loans, look, the Chinese thing Mr. Minister, the Chinese bank ICBC, which gives loans to most of the hospitals in Türkiye, published it on its "web" page, you say: "Contracts are confidential, etc., trade secret." What does the volume based warranty say? "70 percent." says Mr. Minister, 70 percent. You say, "There is no guarantee, there is no patient guarantee." You say, there is a 70 percent guarantee on bed occupancy rate, there is a 70 percent guarantee on examinations, there is a 70 percent guarantee on MRI and tomography, there is a 70 percent guarantee on cleaning services, after that international courts are valid and you cannot give up on these PPP projects. I use this sentence all the time, but look, Mr. Minister, what does the lender, the Chinese Bank ICBC, say? He thanks the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Türkiye "for opening such a path for us." I mean, sorry, he says "thank you", he doesn't say thank you. They were very happy, they were very happy that you gave them these opportunities. Mr. Minister, you also know that it is guaranteed, right? He's not lying. European Development Bank. What has a warranty?

Imaging services, laboratory services, sterilization services, rehabilitation services, waste, laundry services, catering services, that is, in a thousand-bed hospital, if there are 3 thousand meals a day, if there is a diet, you guarantee 70 percent of it, that is, even if it is not eaten, you guarantee that 70 percent of it will be eaten.
Now, since we look at this patient as a customer rather than a human being in hospitals, there is something like this: Mr. Minister, as it has been said before, we have a lot of MRI and CT scans. After you privatized the MRI and tomography in these city hospitals in Türkiye, they gave it to the contractor, the subcontractor. MRIs are recorded on television, and there are serious errors in the MRIs recorded on television. Look, an MRI or tomography is being performed in a hospital in Ankara, a doctor in Istanbul considers this as television, but it is not possible for you to control who this doctor is. I talked to friends at the hospital, doctor friends. Most of the reports are fabricated. Last year, 1 tomography was read for 5 liras. Dear Minister, one tomography is read for 5 liras and the doctor reads 1 tomography and MRI in one minute. You are the inventor of this system, you did a pretty good job actually. It's pirated medicine, pirated appointments, everything.
In the appointment system, last week I decided to make an appointment myself at Kütahya City Hospital. They said "November 28", it takes fifteen days, exactly on the 15th day, a doctor was free, that day, but I want to go to the endocrinologist, I am a chronic diabetic, I do not have the chance to go to the endocrinologist directly, but actually I need to go to the endocrinologist. You keep the internist or nephrologist busy in this way, you cannot move on to other branches without going through the internal specialist, but the chronic patient can make an appointment directly there, your HBYS system. Oh, let me tell you that, your HIS system was also a fiasco. A minister opened the 182 call center in Erzurum to create employment in his own province, someone opened it in Edirne, Mehmet Müezzinoğlu, that Minister with a questionable hospital, your Minister, the AK Party Minister. Müezzinoğlu opened it there. Can't you set up your own switchboards and appointment systems in hospitals?
Then why is there only Medula, SGK's system Medula only, and 10-15 software in HIS? Their resources are the same, their infrastructure is the same. Why do you offer public resources to contractors through HIS? There are 20 HIS programs, you pay per terminal, each has different fees and most of them do not have a serious structure.
Dear Minister, which one should we talk about? Should we talk about other things, things that will make you feel a little more comfortable? For example, are you considering broadcasting a public service announcement about violence in healthcare? Will you be content with "tweeting" when a physician friend is stabbed or a healthcare worker is beaten or assaulted? Do you plan to broadcast public service announcements for yourself, Ministry officials, physician friends on television, etc. and on social media, or do you plan to be just a "tweet" Minister like Fahrettin Koca - the former Minister, I will not speak in his absence, we said it to his face - and will you continue on your way that way?

Also, Mr. Minister, it has existed for years, I do not know if you agree with Recep Akdağ in this health system. I mean, continuity is essential in the Ministry and the same in the state. He called compulsory service "inhumane." "Such a
cannot be implemented." He said, abolished compulsory service six months later, then brought it back again. While you have the opportunity to turn this compulsory service into voluntary service, why not do it? You subject your fellow doctors to five hundred days of compulsory service, and after five hundred days they run away. Look, all the places in Ankara that teach in German and in English are full of doctors. Rest assured, there were no quotas for German courses last year. I don't know if you would consider improving this medical education, the status of assistantship and the status of specialty, but it is possible to turn it into voluntary service, but you cannot do it. Men can employ doctors and medical personnel in the snow and glaciers in Alaska, but we can't, right? Because it's forced. Compulsory service, which does not exist in any other professional group, unfortunately exists in Türkiye; It shouldn't be.
Dear Minister, do you know what is the latest stage of the healthcare system you introduced in Türkiye? 3 prescriptions are written for a patient, sometimes 2 prescriptions are written for the same disease. I say again, 3 prescriptions are written for one patient. From where? If you give me an appointment for fifteen days later, what should I do? If it's a little distressing, I go to the emergency room in the evening. You published a circular and said, "The yellow area will exceed the green area in emergency services." This circular is your Ministry's circular, it is new. I go to the emergency room, the emergency physician prescribes a medicine; If I am not satisfied, I go to the family doctor the next day, and then, if it gets worse, I go to a private hospital. Oh, the private hospital part is also a fiasco. See, there's something else misleading about health care spending. Let's go to the hospitals in Ankara together. Look, you can pay 200 percent SSI contribution, right sir? For example, the average examination costs 100 liras, you have to pay 200 liras, but it costs 2 thousand liras, while the hospitals here cost 1,500-2,000 liras. A private hospital for me in Istanbul. There is also a package application. You see these deficiencies in your inspections, why don't you report them to the Ministry of Labor and SSI, if you are doing inspections? I believe that you, the Ministry of Health, do not seriously inspect private hospitals. I also worked as a private hospital employee, you have zero supervision; Out of 100, rest assured, it's not even 1.
Dear Minister, I say come, tomorrow evening, the next day, let's go to a hospital together, let's go together, make this promise. "These corruptions and irregularities cannot be committed in the hospitals of my Ministry." can you say? I wonder if your team can seriously supervise? Your inspection is truly a fiasco.
Look, I want to get into the newborn gang - the last two or three minutes - especially I will; It's not even just 1 percent of what the iceberg is visible. "From where?" you will say. Whether the sick children died there or not, it doesn't matter; Some casual sentences were made, but do you know where the real problem is, Mr. Minister?

Children who were kept in the neonatal intensive care unit even though they were healthy, and who were thrown into those incubators in the neonatal intensive care unit even though they were healthy. In most families - you know, you know a pediatrician, you know a little about it yourself - those who are hospitalized and intubated immediately say "respiratory failure" due to that bruise etc. Look, there are reports of patients who were intubated for sixty-five days, removed from intubation on the 66th day, connected to CPAP, and discharged on the 67th day, and there are patients who were discharged on the 67th day, somehow they adapted in one day. It's mostly the invisible part of the iceberg. Place cameras in neonatal intensive care units so as not to violate privacy; Rest assured, most of the neonatal intensive care units in the private sector will close themselves within a month because there are not enough doctors and for unnecessary hospitalizations, for those who are shown to be intubated even though they are not.
Dear Minister, is the responsible manager of one of those hospitals the Minister, the owner, or a serious partner? Second: Have you ever inspected that hospital for five years or do your friends who have inspected it have reports? Have you inspected the former Minister's hospital - although it is a foundation hospital? Will you make the audit reports public - especially the former Minister's hospitals?
I say it again and again, Mr. Minister, come, one evening together, Ankara can be Istanbul, knock on door, unannounced.
Let's go to 5 hospitals, 5 hospitals. Although it is your duty, you have to go now. Go today evening, you are the Minister, at least do what you did not do when you were the Health Director, Mr. Minister. If you haven't seen these patients and the newborn gang for five years, you don't need to sit here anyway. I repeat what my friends said and what our group, the Republican People's Party Group, said: You called the Yenidoğan gang a "rotten apple gang".
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please let's finish.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - This does not exonerate you, it does not simplify the situation, so it is really difficult for you to sit there.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - “They did not have their share of humanity.” he said, he didn't say that.
ALI FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Sir?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - “They did not have their share of humanity.” he said, defined it that way.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - He said "rotten apple"; This is gang, gang.
Look, the Minister of Health was dealing with this mass of people who did not have their share of humanity when he was the Provincial Health Director. Have you never seen it? This ship is taking on water, it's obvious, very obvious. There are 4 thousand beds in the public sector, neonatal intensive care beds, 8 thousand beds in the private sector, the same is not in the adult intensive care unit and you do not inspect them. I insist on saying that there are intensive care units where rogue doctors work 90 percent of the night. Let SSI terminate the agreement today, those private hospitals cannot do this; It's that simple.
Although you will speak when your turn comes, let me tell you this: You tell me together - there are also friends from the AK Party, it does not matter, MP friends and my Minister of Health are also here - let's go tonight, let's go door to door tomorrow evening, let's inspect 5 hospitals in Istanbul.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Deputy, one last minute, let's greet each other.

ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - If it is in accordance with the legislation, I will resign from the parliament, okay? Will you resign, Mr. Minister?
Thank you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What I want to say is this: Mr. Minister defines the name of the operation as "rotten apple operation".
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - He put it wrong, it was soft, it was a bit soft.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kasap, thank you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, excuse me.
The name of the gang is "He has no share of humanity." aspect.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - His name is not important. I say, let's go to the hospital together one evening and check it together.

records.originalTurkish:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.
Değerli hazırun, hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Şimdi ben bir çocuk sağlığı hastalıkları uzmanı olarak konuşmak istiyorum Sayın Bakan. Çetelerin cirit attığı hastanelerde onlar faaliyetine devam ederken siz sağlık müdürüydünüz. İstanbul'da sağlık müdürlüğü yapıp da bir hastanede sadece 2 yenidoğan yoğun bakım uzmanıyla bir hastanenin nasıl döneceğini, o birimin nasıl döneceğini biliyor olmanız gerekiyor. 68 saat mesai yapıyor haftada. İş Kanunu'na da her türlü kanuna da aykırı. Bu şahısların gece orada olmadığını siz de biliyorsunuz. İstanbul'daki hastanelerde, İzmir'deki hastanelerde, Ankara'daki özel hastanelerde özellikle gece nöbetlerinde ve yoğun bakımlarda kimlerin nöbet tuttuğunu siz de Bakan Yardımcılarınız da çok iyi biliyor. O hastanede görevli olmayan, o hastanede çalışmayan hatta hiç olmayan... En son mahkeme kayıtlarında da var yani hemşireler nöbet tutuyor ve kendisini doktor diye tanıtıyor. Artı yabancı uyruklular çalışıyor, artı asistanlar çalışıyor, yeterli ücret alamayan, maaşları yetmeyen asistanlar yetkileri olmamasına rağmen o hastanelerde nöbet tutuyor.
Ben sizden şimdiden şunun sözünü alayım: Çat kapı, tebdilimekân, gelin, İstanbul'daki hastaneleri, 10-15 tane hastaneyi eğer gücünüz yetiyorsa Avrasya Hastanesi başta olmak üzere çat kapı gidip bir gece nöbetinde ziyaret edelim ve bu facianın... Hani sizin "çürük elma" diyerek hafiflettiğiniz olay var ya, yenidoğan çetesi, bu çetelere siz müdahale edemediniz çünkü bunlar ağır toplardı. Bunlar ağır toplar olduğu için siz Sağlık Müdürlüğünüz döneminde bunları es geçtiniz, farkındaydınız hepsinin. Hani bir söz var ya, herkes geminin su aldığını biliyordu, kaptan yalan söylüyordu, zarlar da hileliydi ya... Bunların hepsi biliniyordu, buradaki Bakanlık yetkililerinin hepsi biliyor bence, bilmemeniz mümkün değil, bilmiyorsanız eğer zaten buralara gelmeniz doğru değildi. Sizin Bakan olarak buraya gelmeniz hiç doğru değildi; tüm samimiyetimle söylüyorum bunu. Allah kimseyi sizin durumunuza düşürmesin. "Neden?" diyeceksiniz. Yalanı, yanlışı ve gerçek dışı şeyleri savunmak zorunda kaldınız, şu anda da öylesiniz.
Ben de sizin gibi sağlık sisteminin tüm aşamalarında çalıştım. İlk görev yerim de güzel bir yerdi, Burdur Yeşilova Salda'da sağlık ocağı hekimi olarak çalıştım. Akademik kariyerim de var. En son buraya istifa etmeden gelirken bir eğitim araştırma hastanesinde başhekim yardımcısıydım. Sistemin aksamayan bir yeri yok, düzeltilecek bir yeri de kalmamış Sayın Bakan.
Şimdi, aile hekimliğiyle ilgili sayın vekilim de bahsetti, aile hekimlerini şu derme çatma binalardan kurtarın, artık kamunun malı olsun. Hekim arkadaşlar binanın boyası, binanın badanası, personeli, maaşı, ısıtma giderleri vesaire, emin olun bu cari giderleri vesaireyle uğraşmaktan hasta bakmaya fırsat bulamıyorlar ve kafalarında binbir düşünce var.
Bir de ne demişsiniz? "Yüzde 98'i lohusa takibi." Ya, Sayın Bakan, hangi ülkede yaşıyorsunuz? Bizde doğumlar hastanede yapılır, hastanede yapıldığı için de lohusalar kırk gün içinde asla sağlık ocağına gitmezler veya aile hekimine gitmezler. Bunu yüzde 98 nasıl taşıttıracaksınız ve bunu taşıtmadığınız zaman da hekim arkadaşın maaşından kesiyorsunuz. Yüzlerce rapor var. Demin de söylenildi yani hekime beş yıldız falan veriliyor ya, biz önceki bakanlara falan veya AK PARTİ Hükûmetinin milletvekillerine acaba yıldız versek ne olurdu? Hani beş yıldız beğeni şeyi var ya. Böyle bir dünya yok ya! Dünyanın hiçbir yerinde yok. Bunu yapmayın Sayın Bakan ve geri alın, size şahsi tavsiyem odur.
Aile hekimliğinde çalışanlar sık sık size de geliyordur, gerçi Twitter'dan vesaire bilgilendirme var. Ya, aynı aile sağlığı hekimliğinde, ASM'de 2 hemşire var, çalışıyor; 2 sağlık görevlisi var, çalışıyor; birisinin maaşı 35-40 bin lira, diğeri asgari ücret, hatta part-time çalışanlar da var.
Bu zulme -eşit işe eşit ücret- bu adaletsizliğe siz son verin Sayın Bakan. Bu boya badana işlerini geçelim.
Gelelim aşılara... Hekimler eğitimini aldıkları zaman diyorlar ki "Rota virüsü -ishal aşısı- menenjit aşısı, hepatit A aşısı -onu yapıyorsunuz gerçi- bir de şu human papilloma virüsü yani rahim ağzı kanseri aşısı yıllardır söz veriliyor, veriliyor, veriliyor ama hâlâ yapılmadı, yapılması gerekiyor." Hekimler bunun eğitimini alıyor. Hastaya söylüyorsunuz, Bakanlık karşılamıyor, SGK karşılamıyor. Sağlık ocağında aşının ücretsiz olması gerekiyor, onu da sağlamanız gerekiyor; eksik olan kısmı o.
Siz aile hekimliği uygulamasını rutine geçirmek istediniz aslında -siz değil de zannedersem 2007 mi ne olacak- 4 ilde pilot -Burdur, Isparta, Denizli- uygulamaya geçildi, sevk zinciri zorunluluğu getirildi ama ilk gün vazgeçtiniz, siyasi saiklerle vazgeçtiniz çünkü politik olarak öyle davranmamanız gerekiyordu, hastane önlerinde yığılmalar oldu, facia oldu ve ilk gün vazgeçtiniz. Değil mi Sayın Bakan Yardımcım? Böyle olması lazım. Sonra yıllarca birinci basamak sevki beceremediniz, ikinci ve üçüncü basamağı beceremediğiniz gibi, beceremediniz. Tamamen facia yaşatıyorsunuz insanlara.
Bakın, Sayın Bakan, ben önerimi de söyleyeyim size, lütfen de dikkate alın. Birinci basamak sağlık hizmetleri tamamen ücretsiz olsa, ilaç katılım payı sıfır olsa veya yüzde 10'a düşürseniz, ikinci basamağa direkt giden veya üçüncü basamağa direkt giden hasta için katılım payını artırsanız hastaların en azından yüzde 30'u o hastanelerde beş dakikalık muayeneye maruz kalmaz, ikinci basamağa gidenlerin yüzde 30'u azalır. Benim şahsi tavsiyem odur, bu sistemin içinde yıllarca bulunmuş birisi olarak söylüyorum.
Şimdi, ASM'lerle ilgili, dediğim gibi, bir de cezalandırma sisteminin 657 sayılı Kanun’una tabi olması gerekiyor. Ayrı bir disiplin yönetmeliği çıkarmak ne demek? Ayrıca, bir hâkim, bir savcı veya bir öğretmen gibi yıllık iznini bir ay kullanan bu hekim arkadaşların maaşları neden kesiliyor? Böyle bir dünya yok ya, on iki günü geçti, yandı ve bunu siz de biliyorsunuz, ASM'lerde çalışan hekim arkadaşlar izne çıktığı zaman diğer arkadaşa devrediyor ve çalışıyormuş gibi görünüyor ve maaşından kesilmemesi için bu hülle yoluna gitmek zorunda kaldılar. Siz de biliyorsunuz, değil mi Sayın Bakanım? Biliyorsunuz, dolaştınız.
Bir çocuk hekimi olarak çocuklarla ilgili şeyi söylemek zorundayım. Ben utanıyorum, SMA'lı çocuklara -bu cümleyi sürekli söylüyorum- valilik izniyle dilencilik yaptırılan bir ülkedeyiz. SMA'lı, DMD hastası, diyabet hastası ama özellikle SMA'lı çocukların valilik izniyle dilencilik yaptırılması sizin Bakanlığınıza nasip oldu. SMA'nın -Zolgensma falan diye isim vermeme gerek yok- tüm dünyada tedavisi yapılıyor, siz de izin verin. Onayını o kadar zorladık, Fahrettin Bey -o da çocuk hekimi- vermedi, verilmedi; bugüne kadar geldik.
Sayın Bakan, şu tablo AK PARTİ hükûmetlerinin icraatıdır; bu tablo çok şey anlatıyor, yazıktır ya! Çocuk sağlığı ve hastalıkları branşı TUS'ta en az istenen, Tıpta Uzmanlık Sınavı'nda en az puanla girilebilen yer oldu. Beş sene sonra Türkiye'de çocukları baktıracak hekim bulamayacaksınız. Çocuk ihtisası için, çocuk uzmanlık kadrosu için açtığınız yerde sadece yüzde 67 tercih edildi, yüzde 33 kadrolarınız boş. 2'nci sırada ne var, en altta? Aile hekimliği, 3'üncü sırada acil tıp, çocuk cerrahisi. Beş sene sonra çocuk cerrahı bulamayacaksınız. Herhâlde Pakistanlı, Afganistanlı hekimlerle yaparsınız veya Suriyeli, ithal hekimlerle. Birinci basamakta en çok istenen yer neresi? Spor hekimliği, deri, nükleer tıp, tıbbi biyokimya ve adli tıp vesaire. Yani beş sene sonra siz hekim bulamayacaksınız, herhâlde onları ithal edeceksiniz.
Sayın Bakan, hangi birini düzeltelim, hangi birinden bahsedelim bilmiyorum ama şu sensör olayını biliyorsunuz, zaten 30 bin çocuk var, bunların 15 bini zor kullanır ve bu da Cumhurbaşkanlığı uçağının onda 1'i yapmıyor, biliyor musunuz bir uçağın onda 1'i yapmıyor. Bu kadar söyletmeye, bu kadarına gerek var mı? Hiç gerek yok.
Şimdi, şehir hastaneleri ve ikinci basamağa gelince, Sayın Bakan, olay orada. Eski Bakanlar hep dediler ki: "Hasta garantimiz yok." "Hasta garantimiz yok. "Hasta garantimiz yok. Siz de diyorsunuzdur büyük bir ihtimalle de ama şey yalan söylüyor değil mi? Bu
kamu-özel iş birliğiyle yapılan hastanelerin yüzde 80 yurt dışı krediyle ödenen kısmı, bakın, Çinlilerin şeyi Sayın Bakan, Türkiye'deki hastanelerin büyük bir kısmına kredi veren Çin bankası ICBC, "web" sayfasında yayınlamış, siz diyorsunuz ya: "Sözleşmeler gizli saklı, vesaire, ticari sır." Volume bazlı garanti ne diyor? "Yüzde 70." diyor Sayın Bakan, yüzde 70. Siz "Garanti yok, hasta garantisi yok." diyorsunuz, yatak doluluk oranında yüzde 70 garanti var, tetkiklerde yüzde 70 garanti var, MR, tomografide yüzde 70 garanti var, temizlik hizmetlerinde yüzde 70 garanti var, ondan sonra uluslararası mahkemeler geçerli ve siz bu KÖİ projelerinden vazgeçemiyorsunuz. Bu cümleyi de hep sürekli kullanıyorum ama bakın Sayın Bakan, kredi veren Çin Bankası ICBC ne diyor? Teşekkür ediyor Türkiye Cumhuriyeti Sağlık Bakanlığına "Bize böyle bir yol açtığınız için." yani pardon, "thank you" diyor, teşekkür etmiyor da. Çok mutlu olmuşlar, siz bu fırsatları verdiğiniz için çok mutlu olmuşlar. Sayın Bakan, garanti olduğunu siz de biliyorsunuz, değil mi? Yalan söylemiyor. Avrupa Kalkınma Bankası... Nelerde garanti var? Görüntüleme hizmetleri, laboratuvar hizmetleri, sterilizasyon hizmetleri, rehabilitasyon hizmetleri, atık, çamaşırhane hizmetleri, catering hizmetleri yani bin yataklı hastanede günde atıyorum 3 bin öğün yemek çıkıyorsa, diyet çıkıyorsa bunun yüzde 70'ini siz garanti ediyorsunuz yani yenmese de yüzde 70 kadar yenmesini garanti ediyorsunuz.
Şimdi, hastanelerde bu hastaya insan değil müşteri gözüyle baktığımız için şöyle bir şey var: Sayın Bakan, demin de denmiş gerçi, MR ve tomografi sayımız çok fazla. Türkiye'de bu şehir hastanelerindeki MR, tomografiyi siz özelleştirdiniz ya, onlar da müteahhide verdi, alt taşeron. MR'lar televize çekiliyor, televize çekilen MR'larda çok ciddi hatalar var. Bakın, Ankara'da bir hastanede MR çekiliyor, tomografi çekiliyor, İstanbul'daki bir hekim bunu televize olarak değerlendiriyor ama bu hekimin kim olduğunu denetlemeniz mümkün değil. Ben hastanede arkadaşlarla konuştum, hekim arkadaşlarla. Raporların çoğu uyduruk. Geçen sene 5 liraya 1 tomografi okunuyordu Sayın Bakan ya, 5 liraya bir tomografi ve hekim bir dakikada 1 tomografi, MR okuyor. Siz bu sistemin mucidisiniz, bayağı da iyi yaptınız aslında. Bu korsan hekimlik, korsan randevular, her şey var.
Randevu sisteminde, geçen hafta kendim bir randevu alayım dedim Kütahya Şehir Hastanesinden. "28 Kasım" dediler, on beş gün yapıyor, tam 15'inci gün bir hekim boşmuş, o gün ama ben endokrine gitmek istiyorum, kronik diyabet hastasıyım, direkt endokrine gitme şansım yok ama aslında endokrine gitmem gerekiyor. Dahili uzmanını veya nefroloji uzmanını bu şekilde meşgul ediyorsunuz, dahili uzmanından geçmeden diğer branşlara geçilemiyor ama kronik hasta direkt oraya randevu alabilecek, sizin HBYS sisteminiz... Ha, onu da söyleyeyim, sizin HBYS sistemimiz de bir fiyaskoydu. Bir bakan kendi ilinde istihdam oluşturmak için 182'nin çağrı merkezini Erzurum'da açtı, birisi Edirne açtı, Mehmet Müezzinoğlu, hani şu hastanesi şaibeli olan Bakan, sizin Bakanınız, AK PARTİ'li Bakan. Müezzinoğlu oraya açtı. Ya, hastanelerde kendi santrallerini, kendi randevu sistemlerini kuramaz mısınız?
Sonra neden Medula tek de, şu SGK'nin sistemi Medula tek te HBYS'de 10-15 tane yazılım var? Çekirdikleri aynı, altyapıları aynı. Neden HBYS vasıtasıyla kamunun imkânlarını müteahhitlere peşkeş çekiyorsunuz? 20 tane HBYS programı var, terminal başına ücret veriyorsunuz, her birinin ücretleri farklı ve çoğunun da ciddi bir yapılanması yok.
Sayın Bakanım, hangi birisinden bahsedelim, başka şeylerden bahsedelim mi, biraz da sizi rahatlatacak şeylerden? Mesela sağlıkta şiddetle ilgili kamu spotu yayınlamayı düşünüyor musunuz kendiniz? "Tweet" atmakla yetinecek misiniz bir hekim arkadaş bıçaklandığında, bir sağlık çalışanı dövüldüğünde, darp edildiğinde? Kamu spotu kendiniz ve Bakanlık yetkilileri, hekim arkadaşlardan televizyonlarda vesaire ve sosyal medyada yayınlamayı düşünüyor musunuz yoksa Fahrettin Koca gibi -eski Bakan, gıyabında konuşmayayım, yüzüne de söylemiştik- sadece "tweet" Bakanı olmayı mı düşünüyorsunuz, o şekilde mi devam edeceksiniz yolunuza?
Bir de Sayın Bakan, yıllardır var, siz bu sağlık sisteminde Recep Akdağ'a katılıyor musunuz bilmiyorum yani Bakanlıkta da devamlılık esastır, devlette de öyle. Mecburi hizmete "insanlık dışı" demişti. "Böyle bir
uygulama olamaz." dedi, altı ay sonra mecburi hizmeti kaldırdı, sonra tekrar geri getirdi. Bu mecburi hizmeti gönüllü hizmet hâline getirme imkânınız varken neden yapmıyorsunuz? Hekim arkadaşları beş yüz gün zorunlu mecburi hizmete tabi tutuyorsunuz, bulunduğu yerden beş yüz gün sonra vın kaçıyor. Bakın, Ankara'daki bütün Almanca eğitim veren, İngilizce eğitim veren yerlerde doktorlar dolu. Almanca kurslarında geçen sene, emin olun, kontenjan bulunamıyordu. Bu tıp eğitimini, asistanlığın durumunu ve uzmanlığın durumunu düzeltmeyi düşünür müsünüz bilmiyorum ama gönüllü hizmet hâline getirmek mümkün ama siz yapamıyorsunuz. Adamlar Alaska'da karın, buzulun içinde hekim istihdam edebiliyor, sağlık personeli istihdam edebiliyor ama biz edemiyoruz, değil mi? Zoraki çünkü. Başka hiçbir meslek grubunda olmayan zorunlu hizmet, maalesef, Türkiye'de var; olmaması gerekiyor.
Türkiye'de getirdiğiniz sağlık sisteminin en son aşaması nedir Sayın Bakan, biliyor musunuz? Bir hastaya 3 reçete yazılıyor, bazen 2 reçete yazılıyor aynı hastalık için. Tekrar söylüyorum, bir hastaya 3 reçete yazılıyor. Neden? On beş gün sonrasına randevu verirseniz bana, ben ne yapıyorum? Eğer biraz sıkıntılıysa akşam acile gidiyorum. Bir genelge yayınlamışsınız, demişsiniz ki "Acil servislerde sarı alan yeşil alanı geçecek." Bu genelge sizin Bakanlığınızın genelgesi, yeni. Acile gidiyorum, acil hekimi bir ilaç yazıyor; tatmin olmazsam ertesi gün aile hekimine gidiyorum, sonra eğer bıçak kemiğe dayanırsa özel hastaneye gidiyorum. Ha, özel hastane kısmı da fiyasko. Bakın, orada sağlık harcamalarıyla ilgili yanıltıcı bir şey daha var. Ankara'daki hastanelere de beraber gidelim. Bakın, yüzde 200 SGK katılım payı verebiliyorsunuz değil mi efendim? Mesela, 100 liradır ortalama muayene, 200 lira vermeniz gerekiyor ama 2 bin liraya bakıyor ki buradaki hastaneler, 1.500-2.000 lira. İstanbul'da bana bir özel hastane... Ki paket uygulaması da var. Siz bu denetimlerinizde bu aksaklıkları görüyorsunuz, neden Çalışma Bakanlığına ve SGK'ye bildirmiyorsunuz o zaman, denetleme yapıyorsanız eğer? Ben, sizin, Sağlık Bakanlığının özel hastaneleri ciddi bir şekilde denetlemediğine inanıyorum. Bir özel hastane çalışanı da oldum, denetlemeniz sıfır; 100 üzerinden, emin olun, 1 bile değil.
Sayın Bakan, diyorum ki gelin, yarın akşam olur, ertesi gün olur, çat kapı bir hastaneye gidelim beraber, beraber gidelim, bu sözü verin. "Benim Bakanlığımdaki hastanelerde bu yolsuzluklar, bu usulsüzlükler yapılamaz." diyebilir misiniz? Ekibiniz acaba ciddi şekilde denetleyebiliyor mu? Gerçekten denetlemeniz fiyasko.
Bakın, yenidoğan çetesine -son iki üç dakika- girmek istiyorum, özellikle gireceğim; buz dağının görüneninin sadece yüzde 1'i bile değil. "Neden?" diyeceksiniz. Orada hasta çocuklar öldü veya ölmedi, önemli değil; biraz laubali cümleler falan sarf edildi ama asıl sıkıntı nerede, Sayın Bakan, biliyor musunuz? Sağlam olduğu hâlde yenidoğan yoğun bakım ünitesinde tutulan, sağlam olduğu hâlde yenidoğan yoğun bakım ünitesine, o kuvözlere atılan çocuklar... Ailelerin çoğunda -bilirsiniz, çocuk hekimi tanıdıklarınız vardır, kendiniz de az buçuk bilirsiniz- o morarma vesaireyle direkt olarak "solunum yetmezliği" deyip yatırılıp entübe edilen... Bakın, altmış beş gün entübe olup 66'ncı gün entübasyonu çıkarılıp CPAP bağlanan, 67'nci gün çıkarılan hasta raporları var, 67'nci gün taburcu edilen hasta var, bir günde adaptasyonu nasıl yaptıysa. En çok buz dağının görünmeyen kısmı... Yenidoğan yoğun bakım ünitelerinde mahremiyeti bozmayacak şekilde kamera koyun; emin olun, o özel sektördeki yenidoğan yoğun bakım ünitelerini çoğu bir ay içinde kendileri kapatacaktır yeterli hekim olmadığı için ve gereksiz yatışlar için, entübe edilmediği halde entübe gösterilenler için.
Sayın Bakan, o hastanelerin bir tanesinin mesul müdürü acaba Bakan mı, yoksa sahibi mi, yoksa ciddi ortağı mı? İkincisi: Siz, beş yıl boyunca o hastaneyi hiç denetlediniz mi veya denetleyen arkadaşlarınızın raporları var mı? Eski Bakanın hastanesini -gerçi vakıf hastanesi ama- denetlediniz mi? Denetimle ilgili raporları kamuoyuna -özellikle eski Bakanın hastanelerini- açıklayacak mısınız?
Tekrar tekrar söylüyorum Sayın Bakan, gelin, beraber bir akşam Ankara olur, İstanbul olur, çat kapı, habersiz
5 hastaneye gidelim, 5 hastaneye. Gerçi sizin göreviniz, şu anda sizin gitmeniz gerekiyor. Bugün akşam gidin, Bakansınız, en azından Sağlık Müdürüyken yapmadığınızı şimdi yapın Sayın Bakan. Bu hastaları, yenidoğan çetesini siz beş yıl boyunca görmediyseniz zaten burada oturmanıza gerek yok. Arkadaşların söylediği sözü ve grubumuzun, Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi Grubunun da söylediği sözü ben tekrarlıyorum: Yenidoğan çetesine “çürük elma çetesi" dediniz.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Lütfen tamamlayalım.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Bu sizi aklamaz, olayı basite indirgemez yani gerçekten orada oturmanız zor.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - “İnsanlıktan nasibini almamışlar.” dedi, öyle demedi.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Efendim?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - “İnsanlıktan nasibini almamışlar.” dedi, öyle tanımladı.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - “Çürük elma” dedi ya; bu çete, çete.
Bakın, insanlıktan nasibini almamış olan bu kitleyle Sayın Sağlık Bakanı, İl Sağlık Müdürüyken muhataptı. Hiç mi görmediniz ya? Bu gemi su alıyor, bu bariz, çok bariz. Kamuda 4 bin tane yatak var, yenidoğan yoğun bakım yatağı, özel sektörde 8 bin küsur, aynısı yetişkin yoğun bakımda değil ve bunları denetlemiyorsunuz. Israrla söylüyorum, gece yüzde 90’ında korsan hekimler çalışan yoğun bakım üniteleri var. SGK anlaşmasını bugün feshetsin o özel hastaneler bu işlemi yapamazlar; bu kadar basit.
Gerçi siz sıranız gelince konuşacaksınız da ben şunu söyleyeyim: Siz bana deyin ki beraber -AK PARTİ’den arkadaşlar da var, hiç önemli değil, milletvekili arkadaşlar ve Sağlık Bakanım da burada- gelin bu akşam gidelim, yarın akşam çat kapı gidelim, İstanbul'da 5 hastaneyi denetleyelim.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Vekilim, son bir dakika, selamlayalım.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Eğer mevzuata uygun ise ben milletvekilliğinden istifa edeceğim, tamam mı? Siz istifa edecek misiniz Sayın Bakan?
Teşekkür ediyorum.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Söylemek istediğim şu: Sayın Bakan operasyonun adını “çürük elma operasyonu” olarak tanımlıyor.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Yanlış koymuş, yumuşak olmuş, soft olmuş biraz.
OTURUM BAŞKANI ORHAN ERDEM - Sayın Kasap, teşekkür ederim.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - Başkanım, affedersiniz.
Çetenin adını da "İnsanlıktan nasibini almamış." olarak...
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Adı önemli değil. Ben diyorum ki gelin sizinle beraber çat kapı bir akşam hastaneye gidelim, beraber denetleyelim.
records.englishTranslation:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear present, I greet you all with respect.
Now, I want to speak as a pediatrician, Mr. Minister. You were the health director while they continued their activities in hospitals where gangs were rampant. Being a health director in Istanbul, you need to know how to turn a hospital and how that unit can turn around with only 2 neonatal intensive care specialists. He works 68 hours a week. It is against the Labor Law and all other laws. You also know that these people were not there at night. You and your Deputy Ministers know very well who is on duty in hospitals in Istanbul, hospitals in Izmir, and private hospitals in Ankara, especially during night shifts and in intensive care units. Someone who is not on duty at that hospital, who doesn't work at that hospital, or even who doesn't exist at all. It is also in the latest court records, meaning nurses are on duty and introduce themselves as doctors. Plus foreign nationals are working, plus assistants are working, assistants who cannot get enough wages and whose salaries are not enough are on duty in those hospitals even though they do not have authority.
Let me take this from you now: Come and visit the hospitals in Istanbul, 10-15 hospitals, especially the Avrasya Hospital, if you can afford it, and visit them during a night shift and stop this tragedy. You know, the incident that you make light of by calling it a "bad apple", the newborn gang, you couldn't interfere with these gangs because they were heavy hitters. Since these were heavyweights, you ignored them during your time as the Health Directorate, you were aware of all of them. You know the saying, everyone knew that the ship was taking on water, the captain was lying, and the dice were rigged. All of this was known, I think all the Ministry officials here know, it is impossible for you not to know, if you did not know, it was not right for you to come here anyway. It was not right for you to come here as Minister; I say this with all my sincerity. May God not put anyone in your situation. "From where?" you will say. You were, and are, forced to defend lies, falsehoods and untruths.
Like you, I have worked in all stages of the healthcare system. My first place of duty was also a nice place, I worked as a health center physician in Burdur Yeşilova Salda. I also have an academic career. The last time I came here before resigning, I was the deputy chief physician at a training and research hospital. There is no part of the system that is not broken, and there is nothing left to fix, Mr. Minister.
Now, as my esteemed deputy also mentioned about family medicine, get family doctors out of these makeshift buildings and let them become public property. Doctor friends do not have the opportunity to care for patients because they have to deal with the painting of the building, the whitewashing of the building, their staff, their salaries, heating expenses, etc., rest assured that they do not have the opportunity to care for patients and they have thousands of thoughts in their minds.
And what did you say? "98 percent is postpartum follow-up." Well, Mr. Minister, which country do you live in? In our country, births take place in hospitals, and since they are given in hospitals, postpartum women never go to a health center or see a family doctor within forty days.

How do you get 98 percent of this to be carried, and when you don't, you deduct it from your physician friend's salary. There are hundreds of reports. As it was said before, doctors are given five stars, what would happen if we gave stars to former ministers or members of the AK Party Government? You know, that five-star rating thing? There is no such world! It doesn't exist anywhere in the world. Do not do this, Mr. Minister, and take it back, that is my personal advice to you.
Family medicine staff often come to you, although there is information on Twitter etc. Well, there are 2 nurses working in the same family health clinic, FHC; There are 2 paramedics working; The salary of one is 35-40 thousand liras, the other is minimum wage, and there are even part-time workers.
Mr. Minister, put an end to this oppression - equal pay for equal work - this injustice. Let's skip this paint job.
Let's talk about vaccines. When physicians receive training, they say, "Rota virus - diarrhea vaccine - meningitis vaccine, hepatitis A vaccine - you do that anyway - and this human papilloma virus, that is, cervical cancer vaccine, has been promised, given, given for years, but it has not been done yet, it needs to be done." Physicians receive training on this. You tell the patient, the Ministry does not cover it, SSI does not cover it. The vaccine should be free of charge at the health center, and you need to provide it; That's the missing part.
You actually wanted to make family medicine practice a routine - if not you, I think it will be 2007 - pilot practice was started in 4 provinces - Burdur, Isparta, Denizli - referral chain obligation was introduced, but you gave up on the first day, you gave up for political reasons because you were not supposed to act like that politically, there were crowds in front of the hospitals, a disaster happened and you gave up on the first day. Isn't that right, Mr. Deputy Minister? It should be like this. Then, for years, you couldn't manage the first step referral, just like you couldn't manage the second and third steps. You are causing a complete disaster to people.
Look, Mr. Minister, let me give you my suggestion, please take it into consideration. If primary health care services were completely free, if the drug co-payment was zero or if you reduced it to 10 percent, if you increased the co-payment for patients who go directly to the second step or directly to the third step, at least 30 percent of the patients would not be exposed to a five-minute examination in those hospitals, and 30 percent of those who go to the second step would decrease. That is my personal advice, I say this as someone who has been in this system for years.
Now, regarding PHCs, as I said, the punishment system must also be subject to Law No. 657. What does it mean to issue a separate disciplinary regulation? Moreover, why are the salaries of these physician friends, such as a judge, a prosecutor or a teacher, who use their annual leave for a month, cut? There is no such world, it's been twelve days, it's burned down and you know it, when the physician friends working in ASMs go on leave, they hand it over to another friend and pretend to be working, and they had to resort to this way in order not to have their salaries deducted. You also know, don't you, Mr. Minister? You know, you wandered around.
As a pediatrician, I have to say this about children.

I am ashamed, we are in a country where children with SMA are made to beg with the permission of the governor - I say this sentence all the time. It has been your Ministry's blessing to allow children with SMA, DMD, diabetes, but especially SMA, to beg with the permission of the governor. SMA - I don't need to name it like Zolgensma - is being treated all over the world, let me do the same. We pushed for his approval so much, Mr. Fahrettin - he is also a pediatrician - did not give it, it was not given; We've come this far.
Dear Minister, the following table is the actions of the AK PARTY governments; This painting tells a lot, what a shame! The branch of child health and diseases was the least desired field at TUS and the one that could be entered with the lowest score in the Medical Specialization Exam. After five years, you will not be able to find a doctor to care for children in Türkiye. For child specialization, only 67 percent of the positions you opened for child specialization staff were preferred, and 33 percent of your positions are vacant. What's in the 2nd row, at the bottom? Family medicine is in third place, followed by emergency medicine and pediatric surgery. You won't be able to find a pediatric surgeon in five years. You probably do it with Pakistani, Afghan doctors or Syrian, imported doctors. Where is the most desired place in primary care? Sports medicine, skin, nuclear medicine, medical biochemistry and forensic medicine, etc. So, after five years, you will not be able to find doctors, you will probably import them.
Mr. Minister, I don't know which one we should correct or which one we should talk about, but you know this sensor thing, there are already 30 thousand children, 15 thousand of them barely use it and this does not make 1 tenth of the Presidential plane, do you know that 1 tenth of a plane does not do it. Is there any need to say this much? There is no need.
Now, when it comes to city hospitals and secondary care, Mr. Minister, that's where it's at. Former Ministers always said: "We have no patient guarantee." "We have no patient guarantee. "We have no patient guarantee. You probably say that too, but the thing is lying, isn't it? this
The part of the hospitals built in public-private cooperation, 80 percent of which is paid with foreign loans, look, the Chinese thing Mr. Minister, the Chinese bank ICBC, which gives loans to most of the hospitals in Türkiye, published it on its "web" page, you say: "Contracts are confidential, etc., trade secret." What does the volume based warranty say? "70 percent." says Mr. Minister, 70 percent. You say, "There is no guarantee, there is no patient guarantee." You say, there is a 70 percent guarantee on bed occupancy rate, there is a 70 percent guarantee on examinations, there is a 70 percent guarantee on MRI and tomography, there is a 70 percent guarantee on cleaning services, after that international courts are valid and you cannot give up on these PPP projects. I use this sentence all the time, but look, Mr. Minister, what does the lender, the Chinese Bank ICBC, say? He thanks the Ministry of Health of the Republic of Türkiye "for opening such a path for us." I mean, sorry, he says "thank you", he doesn't say thank you. They were very happy, they were very happy that you gave them these opportunities. Mr. Minister, you also know that it is guaranteed, right? He's not lying. European Development Bank. What has a warranty?

Imaging services, laboratory services, sterilization services, rehabilitation services, waste, laundry services, catering services, that is, in a thousand-bed hospital, if there are 3 thousand meals a day, if there is a diet, you guarantee 70 percent of it, that is, even if it is not eaten, you guarantee that 70 percent of it will be eaten.
Now, since we look at this patient as a customer rather than a human being in hospitals, there is something like this: Mr. Minister, as it has been said before, we have a lot of MRI and CT scans. After you privatized the MRI and tomography in these city hospitals in Türkiye, they gave it to the contractor, the subcontractor. MRIs are recorded on television, and there are serious errors in the MRIs recorded on television. Look, an MRI or tomography is being performed in a hospital in Ankara, a doctor in Istanbul considers this as television, but it is not possible for you to control who this doctor is. I talked to friends at the hospital, doctor friends. Most of the reports are fabricated. Last year, 1 tomography was read for 5 liras. Dear Minister, one tomography is read for 5 liras and the doctor reads 1 tomography and MRI in one minute. You are the inventor of this system, you did a pretty good job actually. It's pirated medicine, pirated appointments, everything.
In the appointment system, last week I decided to make an appointment myself at Kütahya City Hospital. They said "November 28", it takes fifteen days, exactly on the 15th day, a doctor was free, that day, but I want to go to the endocrinologist, I am a chronic diabetic, I do not have the chance to go to the endocrinologist directly, but actually I need to go to the endocrinologist. You keep the internist or nephrologist busy in this way, you cannot move on to other branches without going through the internal specialist, but the chronic patient can make an appointment directly there, your HBYS system. Oh, let me tell you that, your HIS system was also a fiasco. A minister opened the 182 call center in Erzurum to create employment in his own province, someone opened it in Edirne, Mehmet Müezzinoğlu, that Minister with a questionable hospital, your Minister, the AK Party Minister. Müezzinoğlu opened it there. Can't you set up your own switchboards and appointment systems in hospitals?
Then why is there only Medula, SGK's system Medula only, and 10-15 software in HIS? Their resources are the same, their infrastructure is the same. Why do you offer public resources to contractors through HIS? There are 20 HIS programs, you pay per terminal, each has different fees and most of them do not have a serious structure.
Dear Minister, which one should we talk about? Should we talk about other things, things that will make you feel a little more comfortable? For example, are you considering broadcasting a public service announcement about violence in healthcare? Will you be content with "tweeting" when a physician friend is stabbed or a healthcare worker is beaten or assaulted? Do you plan to broadcast public service announcements for yourself, Ministry officials, physician friends on television, etc. and on social media, or do you plan to be just a "tweet" Minister like Fahrettin Koca - the former Minister, I will not speak in his absence, we said it to his face - and will you continue on your way that way?

Also, Mr. Minister, it has existed for years, I do not know if you agree with Recep Akdağ in this health system. I mean, continuity is essential in the Ministry and the same in the state. He called compulsory service "inhumane." "Such a
cannot be implemented." He said, abolished compulsory service six months later, then brought it back again. While you have the opportunity to turn this compulsory service into voluntary service, why not do it? You subject your fellow doctors to five hundred days of compulsory service, and after five hundred days they run away. Look, all the places in Ankara that teach in German and in English are full of doctors. Rest assured, there were no quotas for German courses last year. I don't know if you would consider improving this medical education, the status of assistantship and the status of specialty, but it is possible to turn it into voluntary service, but you cannot do it. Men can employ doctors and medical personnel in the snow and glaciers in Alaska, but we can't, right? Because it's forced. Compulsory service, which does not exist in any other professional group, unfortunately exists in Türkiye; It shouldn't be.
Dear Minister, do you know what is the latest stage of the healthcare system you introduced in Türkiye? 3 prescriptions are written for a patient, sometimes 2 prescriptions are written for the same disease. I say again, 3 prescriptions are written for one patient. From where? If you give me an appointment for fifteen days later, what should I do? If it's a little distressing, I go to the emergency room in the evening. You published a circular and said, "The yellow area will exceed the green area in emergency services." This circular is your Ministry's circular, it is new. I go to the emergency room, the emergency physician prescribes a medicine; If I am not satisfied, I go to the family doctor the next day, and then, if it gets worse, I go to a private hospital. Oh, the private hospital part is also a fiasco. See, there's something else misleading about health care spending. Let's go to the hospitals in Ankara together. Look, you can pay 200 percent SSI contribution, right sir? For example, the average examination costs 100 liras, you have to pay 200 liras, but it costs 2 thousand liras, while the hospitals here cost 1,500-2,000 liras. A private hospital for me in Istanbul. There is also a package application. You see these deficiencies in your inspections, why don't you report them to the Ministry of Labor and SSI, if you are doing inspections? I believe that you, the Ministry of Health, do not seriously inspect private hospitals. I also worked as a private hospital employee, you have zero supervision; Out of 100, rest assured, it's not even 1.
Dear Minister, I say come, tomorrow evening, the next day, let's go to a hospital together, let's go together, make this promise. "These corruptions and irregularities cannot be committed in the hospitals of my Ministry." can you say? I wonder if your team can seriously supervise? Your inspection is truly a fiasco.
Look, I want to get into the newborn gang - the last two or three minutes - especially I will; It's not even just 1 percent of what the iceberg is visible. "From where?" you will say. Whether the sick children died there or not, it doesn't matter; Some casual sentences were made, but do you know where the real problem is, Mr. Minister?

Children who were kept in the neonatal intensive care unit even though they were healthy, and who were thrown into those incubators in the neonatal intensive care unit even though they were healthy. In most families - you know, you know a pediatrician, you know a little about it yourself - those who are hospitalized and intubated immediately say "respiratory failure" due to that bruise etc. Look, there are reports of patients who were intubated for sixty-five days, removed from intubation on the 66th day, connected to CPAP, and discharged on the 67th day, and there are patients who were discharged on the 67th day, somehow they adapted in one day. It's mostly the invisible part of the iceberg. Place cameras in neonatal intensive care units so as not to violate privacy; Rest assured, most of the neonatal intensive care units in the private sector will close themselves within a month because there are not enough doctors and for unnecessary hospitalizations, for those who are shown to be intubated even though they are not.
Dear Minister, is the responsible manager of one of those hospitals the Minister, the owner, or a serious partner? Second: Have you ever inspected that hospital for five years or do your friends who have inspected it have reports? Have you inspected the former Minister's hospital - although it is a foundation hospital? Will you make the audit reports public - especially the former Minister's hospitals?
I say it again and again, Mr. Minister, come, one evening together, Ankara can be Istanbul, knock on door, unannounced.
Let's go to 5 hospitals, 5 hospitals. Although it is your duty, you have to go now. Go today evening, you are the Minister, at least do what you did not do when you were the Health Director, Mr. Minister. If you haven't seen these patients and the newborn gang for five years, you don't need to sit here anyway. I repeat what my friends said and what our group, the Republican People's Party Group, said: You called the Yenidoğan gang a "rotten apple gang".
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Please let's finish.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - This does not exonerate you, it does not simplify the situation, so it is really difficult for you to sit there.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - “They did not have their share of humanity.” he said, he didn't say that.
ALI FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Sir?
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - “They did not have their share of humanity.” he said, defined it that way.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - He said "rotten apple"; This is gang, gang.
Look, the Minister of Health was dealing with this mass of people who did not have their share of humanity when he was the Provincial Health Director. Have you never seen it? This ship is taking on water, it's obvious, very obvious. There are 4 thousand beds in the public sector, neonatal intensive care beds, 8 thousand beds in the private sector, the same is not in the adult intensive care unit and you do not inspect them. I insist on saying that there are intensive care units where rogue doctors work 90 percent of the night. Let SSI terminate the agreement today, those private hospitals cannot do this; It's that simple.
Although you will speak when your turn comes, let me tell you this: You tell me together - there are also friends from the AK Party, it does not matter, MP friends and my Minister of Health are also here - let's go tonight, let's go door to door tomorrow evening, let's inspect 5 hospitals in Istanbul.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Dear Deputy, one last minute, let's greet each other.

ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - If it is in accordance with the legislation, I will resign from the parliament, okay? Will you resign, Mr. Minister?
Thank you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - What I want to say is this: Mr. Minister defines the name of the operation as "rotten apple operation".
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - He put it wrong, it was soft, it was a bit soft.
CHAIRMAN OF THE SESSION ORHAN ERDEM - Mr. Kasap, thank you.
ORHAN YEGİN (Ankara) - President, excuse me.
The name of the gang is "He has no share of humanity." aspect.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - His name is not important. I say, let's go to the hospital together one evening and check it together.

fields.Subject: 2026 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Bütçe Kanunu Teklifi (1/280) ve 2024 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Kesin Hesap Kanunu Teklifi (1/279) ile Sayıştay tezkereleri münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Son olduğuna göre ucu açık.
Sayın Bakanım, mutlaka güzel şeyler yapmışsınızdır, yapmanız da gerekiyor ama ben sizden ve yanınızdaki genç bürokratlarınızdan, Bakan Yardımcılarınızdan bir şey istiyorum: Ne olursunuz şu yurtta, bir hafta Bakanlığı oradan idare etseniz, empati olur.
GENÇLİK VE SPOR BAKANI OSMAN AŞKIN BAK - Biz ziyaret ediyoruz zaten.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Pek genç göremiyorum ama yani bir hafta Bakanlığı idare etseniz... Bakın, burası 20 metrekare, 6 öğrenci kalıyor, Ankara buraya 1 kilometre ileride. Burayı mutlaka ziyaret edin, ben size ismini de vereyim. Bu yurt bakın, 20 metrekare -ben hekimim- kişi başına 8 metrekare yer olması gerekiyor, mevzuatta öyle istiyorsunuz ama yok, burada yok.
Sayın Bakanım, şimdi, şunu kabul etmemiz gerekiyor: İstişare kültürüne açık değilsiniz. "Yapamadık" "yetişemedik" "yapamıyoruz" diyebilmelisiniz. Sözlerin hepsini dinleyip en güzeline tabi olmanız gerekiyordu, müktesebat onu gerektiriyor; uygularsınız da inşallah, onu kabul ediyorum. Yani o söylenen rakamlar, işte, 3 bin lira, ondan sonra yurtta kalıyorsunuz falan... Kontenjanını hak ettiği hâlde, kriterleri yettiği hâlde yurtlarda barındıramadığınız çocuklara karşı eğer adilseniz yurttaki bir öğrencinin maliyeti neyse o parayı eline vereceksiniz; adil olan odur, sizden adalet bekliyor öğrendiler.
İkincisi, gençlikten sorumlu Bakansınız. Bakın, Almanya'daki toplam üniversite öğrencisi sayısı 1,4 milyon, bizde 4,5 milyon örgün öğretimde. Peki, ben size bir şey söyleyeyim: Eğitim fakülteleri, mühendislik fakülteleri, hukuk fakülteleri gerçekten on yıl mezun vermese bizim Türkiye'nin ihtiyacı yok. Bana geçen laboratuvar teknikerleri bölümünden arkadaşlar geldi, mezunlar, bir şey talep ediyorlar Bakanlıktan, dediler ki: "Sağlık Bakanlığı 900 kişilik kadro açacakmış da bunun 2 bine çıkmasını istiyoruz." Peki, dedim, siz kaç kişisiniz? "100 bin" ve bu okullar hâlâ mezun veriyor.
İkincisi ise Kütahya'da demin AK PARTİ'li bir milletvekili arkadaşımız savundu, yanlışı savunmayın; dünyanın en zor şeyi, eksiği savunmayın. Gerçekten ağır, işiniz zor arkadaşlar, bunu kabul ediyorum.
Şimdi Kütahya'ya da geçeceğim. Türkiye'de hemen hemen 950 tane ilçe var, 270'inde KYK yurdu var, diğerlerinde yok. Ben size yer söyleyeyim, siz geldiniz, Dumlupınar. Dumlupınar ilçemizde bir meslek yüksekokulu var ama yurt yok. Öğrenciler kayıt yaptırmak için geliyorlar, adına aldanıyorlar, Dumlupınar Üniversitesi ve Dumlupınar'ın ilde olduğunu zannedip geliyorlar ve kayıt yaptırmadan gidiyorlar. Aynı şekilde Domaniç'te...
Türkiye'de ilçelerdeki meslek yüksekokulu olan yerlerde gerçekten KYK yurdu yok ve oralarda ev de yok. Konut olmadığı için çocuklar kayıtlarını yaptırmadan gidiyor arkadaşlar; o yanlış. Millî Eğitim Bakanlığı ve YÖK'le konuşun da kontenjanları gerçekten azaltın, ihtiyaç yok. Almanya'yla nüfusumuz aynı...
Şimdi, Kütahya'ya gelince, daha önceki Bakan zamanında verilen şehir stadı sözü var -iki üç seçimdir veriliyor- şehir stadını şehrimiz için istirham ediyoruz. Gürsel Bey gibi ben de teşekkür etmek istiyorum size Sayın Bakanım.
Şehirde bir tane yüzme havuzu yok, termal şehir, halka açık, gençlere açık yok. Termallerin çok olduğu şehirde... Bakın, burayı bir vakfa tahsis etmişler Sayın Bakanım; Gediz'de bir gençlik kampı var, Murat Dağı'nda, kış turizmine açık bir yer ve burası bir vakfa tahsis edilmiş gençlik kampı; ne olursunuz, bunu tüm gençlere açın olur mu?
Ayrıca, tarihin en önemli dönüm noktalarından biri olan yer, Dumlupınar ilçesinde bir gençlik merkezine ihtiyaç var. Çanakkale'de 110 bin kişiyle, gençle oraya gittiniz ya Sayın Bakanım, Dumlupınar da önemli merhalelerinden biri bu ülkenin, Kurtuluş Savaşı'nın en önemli merhalesi. Geldiğiniz yer, o Dumlupınar ilçesinin gençlik merkezi yok, ihya etmenizi talep ediyorum. Türk tarihinin en önemli noktası, 130 bin şehidin verildiği yer Dumlupınar'da bir KYK yurdu, bir gençlik merkezi olmak zorunda, olmazsa olmazıdır; gençlik merkezini istiyoruz. Bir sonraki 30 Ağustos Zafer Bayramı'nda daha ciddi bir şekilde orada bir KYK yurdunun açılması ve gençlik merkezinin açılması bence olmazsa olmazıdır; Dumlupınar'ı kimse bilmiyor. Demin arkadaşlar Çanakkale Tarihî Alanı'ndan bahsettiler, Uludağ tarihî alanından ama Dumlupınar olmazsa olmazıdır ve ciddi bir stat istiyoruz.
Eksik olanları zaten biliyorsunuz, 3.000 liranın yetmediğine vicdanen hiçbiriniz de "Hayır." demeyecektir; onu da savunmayın.
Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkanım.
records.englishTranslation:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Since it is the end, it is open-ended.
Dear Minister, you have certainly done good things, and you need to do them, but I want something from you and your young bureaucrats and Deputy Ministers next to you: If you were to manage the Ministry from there for a week, there would be empathy.
MINISTER OF YOUTH AND SPORTS OSMAN AŞKIN BAK - We are already visiting.
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - I don't see many young people, but I mean, if you manage the Ministry for a week. Look, this place is 20 square meters, it accommodates 6 students, Ankara is 1 kilometer away from here. Be sure to visit this place, I will tell you its name. Look, this dormitory is 20 square meters - I'm a doctor - there should be 8 square meters of space per person, you want it in the legislation, but it doesn't exist, it doesn't exist here.
Dear Minister, now we have to accept this: You are not open to the culture of consultation. You should be able to say "we couldn't do it" "we couldn't catch up" "we can't do it". You had to listen to all the words and follow the best, the acquis requires it; I hope you will implement it, I accept it. So the numbers mentioned are 3 thousand liras, after that you stay in the dormitory and so on. If you are fair to the children whom you cannot accommodate in the dormitories even though they deserve the quota or meet the criteria, you will give them whatever the cost of a student in the dormitory is; They learned that he is the just one, justice is expected from you.
Secondly, you are the Minister responsible for youth. Look, the total number of university students in Germany is 1.4 million, and we have 4.5 million in formal education. Well, let me tell you something: If education faculties, engineering faculties and law faculties do not produce graduates for ten years, Türkiye does not need them. Friends from the laboratory technicians department came to me recently, they are graduates, they are demanding something from the Ministry, they said: "The Ministry of Health is going to open a staff of 900 people, but we want this to increase to 2 thousand." Well, I said, how many are you? "100 thousand" and these schools are still producing graduates.
Secondly, a member of our AK Party parliamentarian in Kütahya just defended, do not defend the wrong; The hardest thing in the world, don't defend the shortcoming. It's really heavy, your work is difficult, friends, I accept that.
Now I will go to Kütahya. There are almost 950 districts in Türkiye, 270 of them have KYK dormitories, the others do not. Let me tell you the place, you came, Dumlupınar. There is a vocational school in our Dumlupınar district, but there is no dormitory. Students come to register, they are deceived by the name, they come thinking that Dumlupınar University and Dumlupınar are in the province, and they leave without registering. Likewise with Domaniç.
In Türkiye, there are no KYK dormitories in the districts where there are vocational schools and there are no houses there either. Friends, children leave without registering because there is no housing; it is wrong. Talk to the Ministry of National Education and YÖK and really reduce the quotas, there is no need. Our population is the same as Germany.
Now, when it comes to Kütahya, there is a city stadium promise made during the previous Minister's time - it has been given for two or three elections - we request the city stadium for our city. Like Mr. Gürsel, I would like to thank you, Mr. Minister.
There is not a single swimming pool in the city, it is a thermal city, it is open to the public and not open to young people.

In the city where there are many thermal springs. Look, they allocated this place to a foundation, Mr. Minister; There is a youth camp in Gediz, on Murat Mountain, a place open to winter tourism, and this youth camp is allocated to a foundation; Could you please open this up to all young people?
Additionally, there is a need for a youth center in Dumlupınar district, which is one of the most important turning points in history. You went there with 110 thousand people and young people in Çanakkale, Mr. Minister, Dumlupınar is one of the important stages of this country, the most important stage of the War of Independence. Where you come from, that Dumlupınar district does not have a youth center, I request you to revive it. There must be a KYK dormitory and a youth center in Dumlupınar, the most important point in Turkish history, the place where 130 thousand martyrs were given; We want the youth center. I think it is a must to open a KYK dormitory and youth center there more seriously on the next August 30 Victory Day; Nobody knows Dumlupınar. Friends just talked about the Çanakkale Historical Area, the Uludağ historical area, but Dumlupınar is a must and we want a serious stadium.
You already know what is missing, none of you in your conscience say "No" to the fact that 3,000 liras is not enough. He will not say; Don't defend him either.
Thank you, Mr. President.

records.originalTurkish:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Teşekkürler Sayın Başkan.
Sayın Bakanım, Kütahya'ya ne zaman stat açılacak? Onun sözünü alayım. Dumlupınar ve Domaniç ilçelerimize KYK yurdu ve gençlik Merkezi... Kuruluşun ve kurtuluşun beldesi o 2 beldeye ne zaman KYK yurdu ve gençlik merkezi açacaksınız? O sözü almak istiyorum.
Teşekkürler.
records.englishTranslation:
ALİ FAZIL KASAP (Kütahya) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, when will the stadium be opened in Kütahya? Let me take his word for it. KYK dormitory and youth center in Dumlupınar and Domaniç districts... When will you open KYK dormitory and youth center in those 2 towns, the towns of establishment and salvation? I want to take that promise.
Thanks.
